sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75099" key="o)riplanh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρι-πλανής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρί-πλανος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n75099.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀρειπλ-.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
